report_name: Lakelands Public Health (Ontario) Breach Affects 60,000 Individuals

identities.name: Lakelands Public Health
identities.description: A health unit in Ontario, Canada, that suffered a cybersecurity breach affecting approximately 60,000 individuals. An unauthorized party gained remote access to a server, exfiltrated, and encrypted files containing personal and health information dating back to 1996.

indicators.name: VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
indicators.pattern:
title: VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
id: 2b9a8c1f-3d4e-4f5a-8b6c-1d2e3f4a5b6c
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a common technique used by ransomware to inhibit system recovery.
references:
  - https://todaysnorthumberland.ca/2026/07/04/lakelands-public-health-provides-notice-of-cybersecurity-incident/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-05
tags:
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.impact
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_img:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
  selection_cli:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
  condition: all of selection_*
indicators.description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a common ransomware TTP mentioned as a hunting hint in the article.
